title: μ₀: A Scalable 3D Interaction-Trace World Model
summary: μ₀ is a scalable world model that predicts 3D interaction traces of semantic points — objects, tools, hands, and contact regions — rather than raw pixels or low-level actions, enabling transfer across robot embodiments from video-only pretraining. The model is trained on large collections of human and robot video and generalizes to new manipulators without task-specific action supervision. On the RoboCasa365 benchmark it achieves 30.25% average success, outperforming prior baselines, and demonstrates effectiveness on real UR3 robot manipulation tasks.
